---
title: "EDARK Report"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    self_contained: true
params:
  sections: NULL
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo    = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.width  = 10,
  fig.height = 5
)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(flextable)
```

```{r results='asis'}
for (sec in params$sections) {
  cat("## ", sec$title, "\n\n", sep = "")

  # Plot
  print(sec$plot_obj)
  cat("\n\n")

  # Summary table
  ft <- flextable::flextable(sec$summary_df)
  ft <- flextable::set_table_properties(ft, layout = "autofit")
  ft <- flextable::fontsize(ft, size = 9, part = "all")
  print(ft, preview = "html")

  cat("\n\n---\n\n")
}
```
